name: Bounty Board Agent
description: Runs proof-reviewed community bounties for research, memes, notes, feedback, bug reports, and useful tasks.
degenPitch: Post tasks, review proof, pay the useful ones.
whatItDoes: Accepts proof URLs, hashes, notes, or screenshots.
Requires human review before receipt-gated reward or payout flow.
feeBehavior: Rewards or paid submissions require proof review; fees are visible and receipt-bound.
cursorPrompt: Build a Bounty Board Agent using DNA x402. Create bounty briefs, accept proof URL/hash/timestamp, require human review, issue receipt only after acceptance, and never automate spam or fake engagement.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Bounty Board Agent using DNA x402. Create bounty briefs, accept proof URL/hash/timestamp, require human review, issue receipt only after acceptance, and never automate spam or fake engagement.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds bounty ID and proof hash.
Human review is required before reward.
